title: My morning radio
summary: Describe the radio station and program you listen to in the morning — what it plays and why you like it.
prompt: Write 6–8 short sentences about a radio station or program you listen to in the morning. Say what it plays, when you listen, and why you like it. Use present simple and frequency adverbs.
hintStarters: Every morning, I listen to… It plays…
I turn on the radio when I…
sampleText: Every morning I turn on the radio when I wake up. I listen to a station called Jazz FM. It plays jazz music and soft pop songs. I usually turn it on at about seven o'clock. The volume is low because my neighbour's flat is on the other side of the wall. I listen to the radio while I make breakfast. The music is calm and quiet, so I feel relaxed in the morning. The station also has a weather forecast at half past seven. I always listen to the forecast to know what to wear. The host of the morning show has a friendly voice. He sometimes tells short jokes between the songs. I do not always understand the jokes, but they make me smile. I turn the radio off when I leave the flat at about eight o'clock. Without the radio, my mornings feel very quiet and empty.

sampleAnnotations.phrase: jazz music and soft pop songs
sampleAnnotations.meaningVi: nhạc jazz và nhạc pop nhẹ nhàng
trong khi tôi làm bữa sáng

sampleGrammarNotes.title: Present simple with 'while'
sampleGrammarNotes.bodyVi: Dùng 'while' với thì hiện tại đơn để nói hai hành động xảy ra cùng lúc: 'I listen to the radio while I make breakfast'. Cả hai mệnh đề đều dùng thì hiện tại đơn.
sampleGrammarNotes.bodyEn: Use 'while' with the present simple to show two actions happening at the same time: 'I listen to the radio while I make breakfast'. Both clauses use the present simple.

sampleGrammarNotes.title: Adverbs of frequency
sampleGrammarNotes.bodyVi: Đặt 'usually', 'always', 'sometimes', 'do not always' trước động từ chính: 'I usually turn it on', 'I always listen to the forecast', 'He sometimes tells jokes'.
sampleGrammarNotes.bodyEn: Place frequency adverbs before the main verb: 'I usually turn it on', 'I always listen to the forecast', 'He sometimes tells short jokes'.

sampleTranslationVi: Mỗi sáng tôi bật đài khi thức dậy. Tôi nghe một đài tên là Jazz FM. Đài phát nhạc jazz và nhạc pop nhẹ nhàng. Tôi thường bật đài vào khoảng bảy giờ. Âm lượng thấp vì căn hộ của hàng xóm nằm ở phía kia bức tường. Tôi nghe đài trong khi làm bữa sáng. Nhạc bình tĩnh và nhẹ nhàng nên tôi cảm thấy thư giãn vào buổi sáng. Đài cũng có dự báo thời tiết lúc bảy giờ rưỡi. Tôi luôn nghe dự báo để biết mặc gì. Người dẫn chương trình buổi sáng có giọng nói thân thiện. Ông ấy đôi khi kể những câu đùa ngắn giữa các bài nhạc. Tôi không phải lúc nào cũng hiểu câu đùa nhưng chúng khiến tôi mỉm cười. Tôi tắt đài khi rời căn hộ vào khoảng tám giờ. Không có đài, buổi sáng của tôi cảm thấy rất yên lặng và trống trải.

mcQuestions.prompt: What kind of music does Jazz FM play?
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'It plays jazz music and soft pop songs'.
mcQuestions.hint: Look for the two types of music the station plays.

mcQuestions.prompt: Why does the writer keep the volume low?
options: Because the neighbour's flat is next door
Because the music is too loud
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'The volume is low because my neighbour's flat is on the other side of the wall'.
mcQuestions.hint: Look for the reason related to the neighbour.

mcQuestions.prompt: What does the writer do while listening to the radio?
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'I listen to the radio while I make breakfast'.
mcQuestions.hint: Find the activity that happens at the same time as listening.

mcQuestions.prompt: Why does the writer always listen to the weather forecast?
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'I always listen to the forecast to know what to wear'.
mcQuestions.hint: Look for the practical reason for listening to the forecast.

mcQuestions.prompt: When does the weather forecast come on?
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'The station also has a weather forecast at half past seven'.
mcQuestions.hint: Find the time of the weather forecast in the text.

mcQuestions.prompt: What does the host sometimes do between songs?
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'He sometimes tells short jokes between the songs'.
mcQuestions.hint: Look for what the host does in between music.

options: While I make breakfast, I am listen to the radio.
I listen to the radio while I make breakfast.
I listen to the radio while making to breakfast.
While making breakfast I am listening radio.
mcQuestions.explanation: 'while' connects two present simple actions: 'I listen while I make breakfast'.
mcQuestions.hint: Look for the option with two correct present simple verbs.

mcQuestions.prompt: When does the writer turn the radio off?
options: When leaving the flat at about eight
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'I turn the radio off when I leave the flat at about eight o'clock'.
mcQuestions.hint: Look for the moment when the radio is switched off.

mcQuestions.prompt: How does the writer feel without the morning radio?
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'Without the radio, my mornings feel very quiet and empty'.
mcQuestions.hint: Find the two adjectives used to describe mornings without the radio.

mcQuestions.prompt: Which adverb of frequency fits: 'I ___ listen to the forecast.'
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'I always listen to the forecast' — the writer does it every morning.
mcQuestions.hint: Look for the word that means 'every time, without exception'.

criticalThinkingQuestion: How does music or radio in the morning affect the way you feel for the rest of the day? Why do routines like these matter?
